debug_info.goal:
k : ℕ
hk : Fact (Nat.Prime (4 * k + 1))
⊢ Odd (Fintype.card ↑(ch04.T k))

proof:
rw [← sameCard]
  haveI : Fact (Nat.Prime 2) := ⟨Nat.prime_two⟩
  have h := Equiv.Perm.card_fixedPoints_modEq (p := 2) (n := 1) (secondInvo_sq k)
  rw [card_fixedPoints_eq_one] at h
  exact Nat.odd_iff.mpr h
